# Rules Pack for This Repository

This folder stores external rule frameworks that complement local project rules.

## Included

- squire.rules.md
- behavioral-rules.md
- caliber-claude-template.md

## Priority Order

1. Local project rules in .github/instructions (authoritative)
2. Security and API/database standards from local rules
3. External frameworks in this folder as supplemental guidance

## Notes

- These files were imported from validated, actively maintained repositories.
- Treat external rules as reference patterns, not hard replacements for project-specific conventions.
